purpose: Pre-registered 12-run confirmatory panel (tvm + httpcomponents-client, 2 arms x 3 repeats). Follows path (b) of the reviewer ruling (report.md): the two arm-independent noise classes were treated as real bugs and fixed (tvm smoke steer coordinatized -> the 357-sweep is gone; http verdict coverage-cap fixed), and the ANCHORS were split/refined pre-registration BEFORE this panel sees data. NO post-hoc majority rule. This lock freezes the SPLIT tvm anchors and the EXECUTION-BEARING http anchor VERBATIM; it must match scripts/panel_category3_evaluator.py bit-for-bit.
image_digest_source: run-pin.json:container_image_digest — the agent stamps the image digest into the host+container run-pin mirrors; the collector's run-probe path re-derives it from the created container (_container_image_digest) and refuses to archive on any disagreement.
model_config_note: thinking_model, action_model, sanitized_config, and prompt_bundle_sha256 are recorded per run in each run-pin.json. This panel pins neither model id nor config hash; the run-pin snapshot is authoritative and the collector verifies pin/behavior identity (feature_flags) bit-by-bit before archiving.
run_order_index_note: run_order_index is LIVE and now numbered 0..N-1 over the FILTERED plan being executed (reviewer P2 fix, committed at baseline_sag_sha). Under --only-probes tvm,httpcomponents-client the effective plan is the 12-run panel (no pyyaml calibration), so the indices run 0..11 over that subset — NOT the sparse full-27-slot campaign numbers. scripts/run_category3_panel.py filtered_run_order assigns it stably by run_key and injects SAG_RUN_ORDER_INDEX; agent.py stamps it into the run pin; the collector run-probe verifies its presence on every new live run and refuses to archive a dropped index. Because run_order_index legitimately differs across the repeat runs of one probe/stage, CampaignStore.append EXCLUDES exactly this field from its pin-equality check (reviewer P1 fix) while still rejecting every other pin drift and recording the index verbatim on each pin. No reconstruction-from-ledger-order.

tvm.build_failed_physical_or_better: build_evidence.judgment=='failed' AND build_evidence.source=='physical', OR the honest native middle state build_evidence.judgment=='partial' AND build_evidence.source=='physical' AND build_evidence.green==false, OR strictly better (verdict in {partial,success} with build_evidence.green)
tvm.never_sweep_while_unbuilt: HARD per-run SAFETY anchor: while the native core is unbuilt, EVERY execution-bearing pytest invocation (one carrying a recorded pytest command) carries a node-id path or -k filter (--maxfail alone does NOT select) AND its structured collected_after_deselection <= 50. ZERO pytest invocations PASSES this safety anchor — nothing was swept. A strictly-better run (build green) is EXEMPT and may run the full suite.
tvm.smoke_liveness_is_reported_metric_not_an: smoke_liveness = the count of reps in which the agent landed a REAL smoke (an execution-bearing pytest carrying a node-id/-k filter). REPORTED as a fleet-health metric, aggregated across reps; it is NOT a per-run must-pass anchor (reviewer split: a per-run smoke gate re-punished arm-independent 5/6 compliance noise).
tvm.note: SPLIT anchors (reviewer). collected_after_deselection is the structured python-tool result field; NEVER summary text. Evidence source mode pinned tool-emitted for the whole campaign; it may not switch mid-campaign. This mirrors scripts/panel_category3_evaluator.py evaluate_tvm + tvm_smoke_liveness.

httpcomponents-client.test_phase_workdir_is_root: EXECUTION-BEARING test invocations ONLY: every build(action='test') invocation that ACTUALLY RAN a command (non-empty recorded command, or a success) has working_directory == project root (from the control record's clone/analyze event, never derived from the invocations) AND at least one execution-bearing root test invocation exists. A REJECTED ATTEMPT — empty recorded command with a non-success outcome (the failing reruns' non-root /workspace events) — is NOT a test execution and is excluded.
httpcomponents-client.note: historical 1,856 / recent reruns 2,255; the 16-test mis-scope must be impossible. The execution-bearing refinement mirrors scripts/panel_category3_evaluator.py evaluate_httpcomponents (_is_execution_bearing).

protocol.runs: 12 (2 probes x 2 arms x 3 repeats), interleaved P,F per probe; no pyyaml calibration in this rerun (--only-probes tvm,httpcomponents-client)
protocol.run_order_index: live, numbered 0..N-1 over the filtered 12-run plan (see run_order_index_note)

baseline_reds.note: Panel precondition (analyzer-diet.md:536-555): the SIX pre-existing SUITE failures registered in the campaign ledger at panel start; any NEW suite failure BLOCKS the panel. Suite reds, NOT probes. Matched by node-id keyword up to max_count; an accepted red that spreads to a new call site (count overflow) is a NEW regression that blocks.

supersedes.reason: panel-confirm-tvm-http hit the P1 pin-mismatch / P2 run_order_index defects and was marked superseded (its tvm-P-r1 evidence stands as an observation). This campaign restarts at the fixed SHA.

baseline_sag_sha_note: This is the code-under-test commit (the P1 pin-exclusion + P2 filtered-index fixes). The live worktree is created at repo HEAD when the runner launches; the only commits after this SHA are documentation-only (this campaign lock + archived logs, no src/ or scripts/ change), so the run pins carry a descendant SHA with byte-identical scripts/ and src/. baseline_sag_sha is hard-validated by the collector only for 'baseline'-stage runs, which this filtered P/F panel has none of.
